title: Pressure-Legible Observation 2.0 (PLO2-1.0)
description: SSI output. Post-extraction. Pre-enum-normalization. One record per observation. Contract authority: STRUCTURAL-SIGNAL-INTERPRETER.md

ploID.description: Content-derived PLO-2.0 identifier. SHA-256 hex of sourceSeedId|domain|observation.

actorGroup_raw.description: Raw extracted actor group. Not normalized to enum. Lowercase normalized.

action_raw.description: Raw extracted action verb lemma. Not normalized to enum. Lowercase normalized.

objectRole_raw.description: Raw extracted object role. Not normalized to enum. Lowercase normalized.

domain.description: Perceptual expansion domain label. Inherited from PLO-1.0 observation.

sourceSeedId.description: ID of the originating Atomic Unit. Inherited from PLO-1.0.

cycleMetadata.description: Opaque run context supplied by orchestrator. SSI forwards without validation.
